description: claude-dispatch plugin hooks (U7). SessionStart surfaces resumable runs (orphaned tick chains + seam pauses) so the operator can /dispatch-resume them — surfacing only, never auto-runs. Stop is the engine's OWN deliberate-stop guard: per the U9 spike (docs/research/native-goal-mechanism-spike.md) native /goal is a closed model-judged loop with no external predicate seam, so claude-dispatch ships its own thin Stop hook that BLOCKS via {"decision":"block"} (exit 0) while the I-1-fresh ledger predicate is unmet. Both hooks presence-gate (walk up for <repo>/.claude/dispatch) and always exit 0 (rel-001). Stop arrays merge additively, so this composes with cmux's Stop entries and any native /goal.
